title: [release-1.37] imagebuildah.StageExecutor: clean up volumes/volumeCache
body: Clean up the distinctions between the volumes slice and the volumeCache and volumeCacheInfo maps so that --compat-volumes will work correctly when we're building with multiple layers.  Manual cherry-pick of #5729.

comments.body: Ephemeral COPR build failed. @containers/packit-build please check.
